headline: Palantir (PLTR) Stock May Be 10% Below Fair Value Following Regulated AI Expansion
summary: Palantir Technologies has delivered a very large 3 year share price gain, yet its valuation signals are pulling in different directions, with a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) intrinsic value estimate pointing to the stock as undervalued while market multiples make it look expensive and the overall value score remains weak. Over the past 3 years the stock has returned roughly 7x, which puts extra focus on whether today’s price still leaves a margin between market value and intrinsic...
